## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Dave Capone to GrowthX Labs, discuss company priorities, and align on initial focus areas.](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs needs to formalize onboarding/training processes and systematize growth strategies for clients](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Dave will initially focus on understanding company operations, then contribute to programmatic SEO and e-commerce initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Key contacts: Kyle (go-to person), Jen and Mariana (managing editors Dave will work with)](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Immediate next steps: Get list of key stakeholders, schedule 1:1s, review onboarding materials](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

## Topics

### Company Priorities and Challenges

  - [Structuring/formalizing processes, especially for onboarding new team members](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Improving programmatic SEO approaches (currently treated too similarly to editorial)](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Systematizing growth strategies for clients, particularly post-pilot](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Identifying why some accounts see great growth while others are lukewarm](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Developing better checkpoints and feedback loops with clients](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)

### Dave's Initial Focus and Role

  - [Optimize for deep understanding in first couple weeks](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Review all available materials (recorded calls, cohort 3 content, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Map out fresh perspective on company operations and client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Initially working with managing editors Jen and Mariana, overseeing two "pods" of 4 people each](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Potential to develop new workstreams (e.g., e-commerce focus) based on expertise](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

### Programmatic SEO and E-commerce Opportunities

  - [Content enrichment for product catalogs (e.g., Samsung TVs, car comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Potential webinar in early April showcasing learnings from accounts like Fanatics](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Exploring e-commerce-focused workstream, starting with 1-2 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Onboarding Process for Dave

  - [Kyle as primary point of contact for onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Schedule 1:1s with key stakeholders (list to be provided)](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Attend onboarding sessions this week (recordings available if conflicts)](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Review Slack channels (search for "xd-" and "intern-" prefixes for client accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Familiarize with Notion (SOPs, handbook, account spaces)](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

### Client Highlight: Good Call

  - [CEO implemented learnings from Marcel's workshop, 10x'd traffic](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Now a customer, providing valuable feedback](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Programmatic pages around area codes; team approaching too editorially](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel/Kyle to finalize list of key stakeholders for Dave to meet](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Dave to schedule 1:1s with key team members, especially Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Review onboarding materials, recorded calls, and Notion documentation](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Identify and document any gaps in processes or documentation](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [Explore Good Call account as example of programmatic SEO approach](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Team to standardize more default Slack channels for easier onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/t7rxeUGitdJWyKwGLhA9TzgAEPXs2mKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
